subcodes.first_line: A brief missive from His Holiness, as well as that which was sent from thee, hath been received. Praise be unto God that, outwardly, thou art in good health [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب مختصر آنحضرت و ما ارسل من عندک واصل لله الحمد که بر حسب ظاهر از سلامتی
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort
